title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Securities - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
